tasting_rooms.name: Vinothek Schloss Johannisberg
tasting_rooms.pricing: Vinothek tasting and purchase; structured cellar tours and tastings bookable in advance
tasting_rooms.description: Hilltop Vinothek of Schloss Johannisberg above the Rhine in Geisenheim, where Riesling was first documented as a varietal name on the 1720 estate. Tastings of the estate's Riesling range with views over the slopes.

tasting_rooms.name: Vinothek Schloss Vollrads
tasting_rooms.pricing: Vinothek pours and shop sales; structured tastings in the coach house bookable through the event office
tasting_rooms.description: Vinothek and tasting venue at the 800-year-old Riesling-only estate above Oestrich-Winkel. Tastings take place in the converted coach house with the orangery and seventeenth-century squire's house alongside.

verified.address_quoted: Schloss Vollrads GmbH & Co. Besitz KG | 65375 Oestrich-Winkel | Germany

tasting_rooms.name: Vinothek and WineBar1136 Kloster Eberbach
tasting_rooms.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
tasting_rooms.pricing: Vinothek and WineBar1136 open daily 10:00 to 19:00; flights and bottle sales of Hessische Staatsweinguter wines
tasting_rooms.description: Vinothek and WineBar1136 in the 1136 Cistercian abbey buildings of Kloster Eberbach. Pours and bottle sales from the Hessische Staatsweinguter, the 200-hectare estate of the abbey foundation.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Robert Weil Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting room open Monday to Friday and weekend afternoons; private tastings bookable in advance
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room of the VDP estate at the foot of the Kiedricher Graefenberg slope. Flights of estate Rieslings including the Graefenberg Grosses Gewaechs and noble-sweet Auslese to Trockenbeerenauslese range.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Georg Breuer Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Breuers Kellerwelt vinothek open daily 10:00 to 18:00; tastings of current collection and Berg Schlossberg flights
tasting_rooms.description: Vinothek and 300 square metre Kellerwelt in central Ruedesheim showing labels, glass collections and presses. Tastings of Berg Schlossberg, Berg Roseneck and the estate's Riesling and Pinot range.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Leitz Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tastings of current vintages on request; flights of Berg Roseneck, Berg Rottland and Eins Zwei Dry style wines
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room at Johannes Leitz's Ruedesheim estate, working from VDP Grand Cru parcels in Berg Schlossberg, Berg Roseneck and Berg Rottland. Steep-slope Rieslings shown alongside the Eins Zwei Dry entry range.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Kuenstler Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Vinothek tastings of estate Rieslings and Pinots; structured cellar tours bookable
tasting_rooms.description: Vinothek and event rooms of the VDP estate in central Hochheim am Main on the eastern edge of the Rheingau. Tastings of Holle and Reichestal Grosse Lage Rieslings and Pinot Noir from the Reichestal and Stein sites.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Josef Spreitzer Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tastings and wine sales at the estate by arrangement; cellar tours on request
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room and Straussenwirtschaft of the Spreitzer family estate in Oestrich-Winkel, working 17 hectares including the Doosberg, Lenchen, Jesuitengarten and Wisselbrunnen sites with 97 percent Riesling.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Peter Jakob Kuehn Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tastings by appointment in advance during opening hours
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room of the twelfth-generation family estate in Oestrich, Demeter-certified biodynamic since 2009. Riesling across Doosberg, Lenchen, St. Nikolaus, Hendelberg and Jungfer sites with a Pinot Noir program.

tasting_rooms.name: Weingut Balthasar Ress Vinothek
tasting_rooms.pricing: Vinothek open Monday to Friday 9:00 to 18:00 and weekends 12:00 to 18:00; moderated tastings on request
tasting_rooms.description: Vinothek of the VDP estate on the Hattenheim riverfront, founded 1870. Tastings of Hattenheimer Nussbrunnen, Hallgartener Jungfer and other Riesling sites alongside the estate Pinot range.

tasting_rooms.name: Domdechant Werner Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tastings on request; spring and autumn presentations at the estate
tasting_rooms.description: Tasting room of the 1780 VDP estate in central Hochheim am Main, owned by the seventh generation of the founding Michel family. Estate Rieslings from the Kirchenstueck, Holle and Domdechaney Erste Lage sites.

tasting_rooms.name: Balthasar Ress Weinbar and Vinothek Wiesbaden
tasting_rooms.pricing: By-the-glass pours from the Balthasar Ress range plus partner wineries; bottle sales at estate prices
tasting_rooms.description: Urban vinothek of Weingut Balthasar Ress in the Wiesbaden pedestrian zone, open since 2013. Six days a week of Rheingau Riesling and Spatburgunder by the glass with estate-price bottle sales.
